basic_details.short_information: North Bengal Medical College & Hospital (NBMCH) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. NBMCH/2143 through the official recruitment notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NBMCH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from recognized university.
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Radiology): MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from a recognized university. Must have valid registration of WBMC/any state council at the time of interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for NBMCH Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the North Bengal Medical College & Hospital Recruitment 2026 is Senior Resident.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Resident post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. What are the required qualifications for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from a recognized university and a valid registration with the WBMC or any state council.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC, SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NBMCH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the North Bengal Medical College & Hospital located?
faq.answer: North Bengal Medical College & Hospital is located in Darjeeling, West Bengal, with the pincode 734012.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and registration certificates.
